items.text:
The alien children like to flash lasers to annoy their friends on the playground.
They can use different colors, which vary in how annoying they are.
If Cheryl annoys a friend today
she's going to get a detention.

qwen_content_pure_text.text:
The alien children like to flash lasers to annoy their friends on the playground. They can use different colors, which vary in how annoying they are.
Cheryl is annoying.
If Cheryl annoys a friend today
Animation: pink spot appears in the center of the screen & disappears
she's going to get a detention.
